title: When will the API support formulas?

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!

As far as I understand, with mondaydb formulas now get calculated in the backend. So I was wondering when we can expect the API to return the calculated formula results?

In our app, Spreadsheet Gorilla, we are currently executing the formulas client side. This works to some degree but with certain limitations.

– Simon

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @xatxat,

We do not have an ETA on it yet but we will announce any updates!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias,

thanks for your response. But this is something that is coming, right? Or is it so vague that the API might never support it?

– Simon

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @xatxat,

This will probably happen according to the team.

I can not confirm it as a 100% sure thing until it is confirmed by the team, and that is why I can not give an ETA either.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: okay, thanks
